urdu transliteration text:
Pyaas asghar ki jo dekhi to, uthi ek buka
Upon seeing Asghar's thirst, a cry was raised

Haye ye shaame ghaariban ko sakina ne kaha
On Shaame-e-Ghaariban, Sakina said

english translation text: If only I could give you water

urdu transliteration text: Aaj ki raat tujhe godhi mein sulaloon mere asghar aaja
english translation text: Let me put you to sleep in my lap tonight, come my Asghar
